javascript:(function()%7B'use%20strict'%3Bif(window.__mobileSpacing)%7Btry%7Bwindow.__mobileSpacing.destroy()%3B%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7Dreturn%3B%7Dvar%20LONG_PRESS_MS%3D450%3Bvar%20MOVE_TOLERANCE%3D10%3Bvar%20COLOR_A%3D'%23ef4444'%3Bvar%20COLOR_B%3D'%233b82f6'%3Bvar%20COLOR_LINE%3D'%23f59e0b'%3Bvar%20LABEL_BG%3D'%23f59e0b'%3Bvar%20LABEL_FG%3D'%23ffffff'%3Bvar%20Z%3D2147483600%3Bvar%20SVG_NS%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%3Bvar%20selA%3Dnull%3Bvar%20selB%3Dnull%3Bvar%20touchTimer%3Dnull%3Bvar%20startPoint%3Dnull%3Bvar%20pressActive%3Dfalse%3Bvar%20host%3Ddocument.createElement('div')%3Bhost.id%3D'__mobile_spacing_host__'%3Bhost.setAttribute('data-mobile-spacing'%2C'')%3BObject.assign(host.style%2C%7Bposition%3A'fixed'%2Cleft%3A'0'%2Ctop%3A'0'%2Cwidth%3A'100%25'%2Cheight%3A'100%25'%2CpointerEvents%3A'none'%2CzIndex%3AString(Z)%2C%7D)%3Bvar%20svg%3Ddocument.createElementNS(SVG_NS%2C'svg')%3BObject.assign(svg.style%2C%7Bposition%3A'absolute'%2Cleft%3A'0'%2Ctop%3A'0'%2Cwidth%3A'100%25'%2Cheight%3A'100%25'%2Coverflow%3A'visible'%2CpointerEvents%3A'none'%2C%7D)%3Bsvg.setAttribute('width'%2C'100%25')%3Bsvg.setAttribute('height'%2C'100%25')%3Bhost.appendChild(svg)%3Bvar%20progress%3Ddocument.createElement('div')%3BObject.assign(progress.style%2C%7Bposition%3A'absolute'%2Cwidth%3A'56px'%2Cheight%3A'56px'%2CmarginLeft%3A'-28px'%2CmarginTop%3A'-28px'%2CborderRadius%3A'50%25'%2Cborder%3A'3px%20solid%20rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C0.15)'%2CborderTopColor%3ACOLOR_LINE%2CboxSizing%3A'border-box'%2Copacity%3A'0'%2Ctransition%3A'opacity%20120ms'%2CpointerEvents%3A'none'%2Canimation%3A'__ms_spin%200.8s%20linear%20infinite'%2C%7D)%3Bhost.appendChild(progress)%3Bvar%20toolbar%3Ddocument.createElement('div')%3BObject.assign(toolbar.style%2C%7Bposition%3A'fixed'%2Cleft%3A'50%25'%2Cbottom%3A'16px'%2Ctransform%3A'translateX(-50%25)'%2Cbackground%3A'rgba(17%2C24%2C39%2C0.92)'%2Ccolor%3A'%23fff'%2CborderRadius%3A'999px'%2Cpadding%3A'8px%206px%208px%2016px'%2CfontFamily%3A'-apple-system%2C%20BlinkMacSystemFont%2C%20%22Helvetica%20Neue%22%2C%20Arial%2C%20sans-serif'%2CfontSize%3A'13px'%2ClineHeight%3A'1'%2Cdisplay%3A'flex'%2CalignItems%3A'center'%2Cgap%3A'10px'%2CboxShadow%3A'0%206px%2020px%20rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C0.25)'%2CpointerEvents%3A'auto'%2CuserSelect%3A'none'%2CzIndex%3AString(Z%2B1)%2C%7D)%3Bvar%20status%3Ddocument.createElement('span')%3Bstatus.textContent%3D'%E9%95%BF%E6%8C%89%E9%80%89%E6%8B%A9%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0'%3Btoolbar.appendChild(status)%3Bfunction%20makeBtn(text%2Cbg)%7Bvar%20b%3Ddocument.createElement('button')%3Bb.textContent%3Dtext%3BObject.assign(b.style%2C%7Bbackground%3Abg%7C%7C'rgba(255%2C255%2C255%2C0.15)'%2Ccolor%3A'%23fff'%2Cborder%3A'0'%2CborderRadius%3A'999px'%2Cpadding%3A'6px%2012px'%2CfontSize%3A'12px'%2Ccursor%3A'pointer'%2CtouchAction%3A'manipulation'%2CWebkitTapHighlightColor%3A'transparent'%2C%7D)%3Breturn%20b%3B%7Dvar%20btnClear%3DmakeBtn('%E6%B8%85%E9%99%A4')%3Bvar%20btnClose%3DmakeBtn('%E5%85%B3%E9%97%AD'%2C'%23ef4444')%3Btoolbar.appendChild(btnClear)%3Btoolbar.appendChild(btnClose)%3Bhost.appendChild(toolbar)%3Bvar%20style%3Ddocument.createElement('style')%3Bstyle.textContent%3D'%40keyframes%20__ms_spin%7Bto%7Btransform%3Arotate(360deg)%7D%7D'%3Bhost.appendChild(style)%3Bvar%20prevRootStyle%3D%7BuserSelect%3Adocument.documentElement.style.userSelect%2CwebkitUserSelect%3Adocument.documentElement.style.webkitUserSelect%2CwebkitTouchCallout%3Adocument.documentElement.style.webkitTouchCallout%2C%7D%3Bdocument.documentElement.style.userSelect%3D'none'%3Bdocument.documentElement.style.webkitUserSelect%3D'none'%3Bdocument.documentElement.style.webkitTouchCallout%3D'none'%3Bfunction%20onContextMenu(e)%7Bif(pressActive%7C%7CselA)e.preventDefault()%3B%7Ddocument.addEventListener('contextmenu'%2ConContextMenu)%3Bdocument.documentElement.appendChild(host)%3Bfunction%20rectOf(el)%7Bvar%20r%3Del.getBoundingClientRect()%3Breturn%7Bleft%3Ar.left%2Ctop%3Ar.top%2Cright%3Ar.right%2Cbottom%3Ar.bottom%2Cwidth%3Ar.width%2Cheight%3Ar.height%7D%3B%7Dfunction%20clearSVG()%7Bwhile(svg.firstChild)svg.removeChild(svg.firstChild)%3B%7Dfunction%20drawRect(rect%2Ccolor%2Cdashed)%7Bvar%20r%3Ddocument.createElementNS(SVG_NS%2C'rect')%3Br.setAttribute('x'%2Crect.left)%3Br.setAttribute('y'%2Crect.top)%3Br.setAttribute('width'%2CMath.max(0%2Crect.width))%3Br.setAttribute('height'%2CMath.max(0%2Crect.height))%3Br.setAttribute('fill'%2Ccolor)%3Br.setAttribute('fill-opacity'%2C'0.12')%3Br.setAttribute('stroke'%2Ccolor)%3Br.setAttribute('stroke-width'%2C'1.5')%3Bif(dashed)r.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray'%2C'4%203')%3Bsvg.appendChild(r)%3B%7Dfunction%20drawLine(x1%2Cy1%2Cx2%2Cy2%2Ccolor%2Cdashed)%7Bvar%20l%3Ddocument.createElementNS(SVG_NS%2C'line')%3Bl.setAttribute('x1'%2Cx1)%3Bl.setAttribute('y1'%2Cy1)%3Bl.setAttribute('x2'%2Cx2)%3Bl.setAttribute('y2'%2Cy2)%3Bl.setAttribute('stroke'%2Ccolor)%3Bl.setAttribute('stroke-width'%2C'1.5')%3Bif(dashed)l.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray'%2C'4%203')%3Bsvg.appendChild(l)%3B%7Dfunction%20drawLabel(x%2Cy%2Ctext)%7Bvar%20g%3Ddocument.createElementNS(SVG_NS%2C'g')%3Bvar%20t%3Ddocument.createElementNS(SVG_NS%2C'text')%3Bt.setAttribute('x'%2Cx)%3Bt.setAttribute('y'%2Cy)%3Bt.setAttribute('text-anchor'%2C'middle')%3Bt.setAttribute('dominant-baseline'%2C'middle')%3Bt.setAttribute('font-family'%2C'-apple-system%2C%20BlinkMacSystemFont%2C%20Arial%2C%20sans-serif')%3Bt.setAttribute('font-size'%2C'12')%3Bt.setAttribute('font-weight'%2C'600')%3Bt.setAttribute('fill'%2CLABEL_FG)%3Bt.textContent%3Dtext%3Bsvg.appendChild(t)%3Bvar%20bbox%3Btry%7Bbbox%3Dt.getBBox()%3B%7Dcatch(e)%7Bbbox%3D%7Bx%3Ax-20%2Cy%3Ay-8%2Cwidth%3A40%2Cheight%3A16%7D%3B%7Dsvg.removeChild(t)%3Bvar%20padX%3D6%2CpadY%3D3%3Bvar%20bg%3Ddocument.createElementNS(SVG_NS%2C'rect')%3Bbg.setAttribute('x'%2Cbbox.x-padX)%3Bbg.setAttribute('y'%2Cbbox.y-padY)%3Bbg.setAttribute('width'%2Cbbox.width%2BpadX*2)%3Bbg.setAttribute('height'%2Cbbox.height%2BpadY*2)%3Bbg.setAttribute('rx'%2C'4')%3Bbg.setAttribute('ry'%2C'4')%3Bbg.setAttribute('fill'%2CLABEL_BG)%3Bg.appendChild(bg)%3Bg.appendChild(t)%3Bsvg.appendChild(g)%3B%7Dfunction%20drawSpacing(a%2Cb)%7BclearSVG()%3BdrawRect(a%2CCOLOR_A%2Cfalse)%3BdrawRect(b%2CCOLOR_B%2Cfalse)%3Bvar%20round%3Dfunction(v)%7Breturn%20Math.round(v*10)%2F10%3B%7D%3Bvar%20horiz%3Dnull%3Bif(b.left%3E%3Da.right)%7Bhoriz%3D%7Bx1%3Aa.right%2Cx2%3Ab.left%2Cy%3Anull%7D%3B%7Delse%20if(a.left%3E%3Db.right)%7Bhoriz%3D%7Bx1%3Ab.right%2Cx2%3Aa.left%2Cy%3Anull%7D%3B%7Dvar%20vert%3Dnull%3Bif(b.top%3E%3Da.bottom)%7Bvert%3D%7By1%3Aa.bottom%2Cy2%3Ab.top%2Cx%3Anull%7D%3B%7Delse%20if(a.top%3E%3Db.bottom)%7Bvert%3D%7By1%3Ab.bottom%2Cy2%3Aa.top%2Cx%3Anull%7D%3B%7Dif(horiz)%7Bvar%20overlapTop%3DMath.max(a.top%2Cb.top)%3Bvar%20overlapBottom%3DMath.min(a.bottom%2Cb.bottom)%3Bif(overlapBottom%3EoverlapTop)%7Bhoriz.y%3D(overlapTop%2BoverlapBottom)%2F2%3B%7Delse%7Bhoriz.y%3D(a.top%2Ba.bottom%2Bb.top%2Bb.bottom)%2F4%3B%7D%7Dif(vert)%7Bvar%20overlapLeft%3DMath.max(a.left%2Cb.left)%3Bvar%20overlapRight%3DMath.min(a.right%2Cb.right)%3Bif(overlapRight%3EoverlapLeft)%7Bvert.x%3D(overlapLeft%2BoverlapRight)%2F2%3B%7Delse%7Bvert.x%3D(a.left%2Ba.right%2Bb.left%2Bb.right)%2F4%3B%7D%7Dif(horiz)%7Bvar%20d%3DMath.abs(horiz.x2-horiz.x1)%3BdrawLine(horiz.x1%2Choriz.y%2Choriz.x2%2Choriz.y%2CCOLOR_LINE%2Cfalse)%3BdrawLine(horiz.x1%2Choriz.y-5%2Choriz.x1%2Choriz.y%2B5%2CCOLOR_LINE%2Cfalse)%3BdrawLine(horiz.x2%2Choriz.y-5%2Choriz.x2%2Choriz.y%2B5%2CCOLOR_LINE%2Cfalse)%3Bif(horiz.y%3Ca.top)drawLine(horiz.x1%2Choriz.y%2Choriz.x1%2Ca.top%2CCOLOR_A%2Ctrue)%3Belse%20if(horiz.y%3Ea.bottom)drawLine(horiz.x1%2Choriz.y%2Choriz.x1%2Ca.bottom%2CCOLOR_A%2Ctrue)%3Bif(horiz.y%3Cb.top)drawLine(horiz.x2%2Choriz.y%2Choriz.x2%2Cb.top%2CCOLOR_B%2Ctrue)%3Belse%20if(horiz.y%3Eb.bottom)drawLine(horiz.x2%2Choriz.y%2Choriz.x2%2Cb.bottom%2CCOLOR_B%2Ctrue)%3BdrawLabel((horiz.x1%2Bhoriz.x2)%2F2%2Choriz.y-12%2Cround(d)%2B'px')%3B%7Dif(vert)%7Bvar%20dv%3DMath.abs(vert.y2-vert.y1)%3BdrawLine(vert.x%2Cvert.y1%2Cvert.x%2Cvert.y2%2CCOLOR_LINE%2Cfalse)%3BdrawLine(vert.x-5%2Cvert.y1%2Cvert.x%2B5%2Cvert.y1%2CCOLOR_LINE%2Cfalse)%3BdrawLine(vert.x-5%2Cvert.y2%2Cvert.x%2B5%2Cvert.y2%2CCOLOR_LINE%2Cfalse)%3Bif(vert.x%3Ca.left)drawLine(vert.x%2Cvert.y1%2Ca.left%2Cvert.y1%2CCOLOR_A%2Ctrue)%3Belse%20if(vert.x%3Ea.right)drawLine(vert.x%2Cvert.y1%2Ca.right%2Cvert.y1%2CCOLOR_A%2Ctrue)%3Bif(vert.x%3Cb.left)drawLine(vert.x%2Cvert.y2%2Cb.left%2Cvert.y2%2CCOLOR_B%2Ctrue)%3Belse%20if(vert.x%3Eb.right)drawLine(vert.x%2Cvert.y2%2Cb.right%2Cvert.y2%2CCOLOR_B%2Ctrue)%3BdrawLabel(vert.x%2C(vert.y1%2Bvert.y2)%2F2%2Cround(dv)%2B'px')%3B%7Dif(!horiz%26%26!vert)%7Bvar%20mx%3D(Math.max(a.left%2Cb.left)%2BMath.min(a.right%2Cb.right))%2F2%3Bvar%20my%3D(Math.max(a.top%2Cb.top)%2BMath.min(a.bottom%2Cb.bottom))%2F2%3BdrawLabel(mx%2Cmy%2C'%E7%9B%B8%E4%BA%A4%2F%E5%8C%85%E5%90%AB')%3BdrawEdgeOffset(a%2Cb%2C'top'%2Cround)%3BdrawEdgeOffset(a%2Cb%2C'left'%2Cround)%3BdrawEdgeOffset(a%2Cb%2C'right'%2Cround)%3BdrawEdgeOffset(a%2Cb%2C'bottom'%2Cround)%3B%7Delse%7Bif(horiz%26%26!vert)%7BdrawAlignmentOffset(a%2Cb%2C'top'%2Cround)%3BdrawAlignmentOffset(a%2Cb%2C'bottom'%2Cround)%3B%7Delse%20if(vert%26%26!horiz)%7BdrawAlignmentOffset(a%2Cb%2C'left'%2Cround)%3BdrawAlignmentOffset(a%2Cb%2C'right'%2Cround)%3B%7D%7D%7Dfunction%20drawEdgeOffset(a%2Cb%2Cside%2Cround)%7Bvar%20v1%2Cv2%2CisVertical%2Cx%2Cy%3Bif(side%3D%3D%3D'top'%7C%7Cside%3D%3D%3D'bottom')%7BisVertical%3Dtrue%3Bv1%3Da%5Bside%5D%3Bv2%3Db%5Bside%5D%3Bx%3D(Math.max(a.left%2Cb.left)%2BMath.min(a.right%2Cb.right))%2F2%3B%7Delse%7BisVertical%3Dfalse%3Bv1%3Da%5Bside%5D%3Bv2%3Db%5Bside%5D%3By%3D(Math.max(a.top%2Cb.top)%2BMath.min(a.bottom%2Cb.bottom))%2F2%3B%7Dvar%20diff%3DMath.abs(v1-v2)%3Bif(diff%3C0.5)return%3Bif(isVertical)%7BdrawLine(x%2Cv1%2Cx%2Cv2%2CCOLOR_LINE%2Ctrue)%3BdrawLabel(x%2C(v1%2Bv2)%2F2%2Cround(diff)%2B'px')%3B%7Delse%7BdrawLine(v1%2Cy%2Cv2%2Cy%2CCOLOR_LINE%2Ctrue)%3BdrawLabel((v1%2Bv2)%2F2%2Cy%2Cround(diff)%2B'px')%3B%7D%7Dfunction%20drawAlignmentOffset(a%2Cb%2Cside%2Cround)%7Bvar%20v1%3Da%5Bside%5D%2Cv2%3Db%5Bside%5D%3Bvar%20diff%3DMath.abs(v1-v2)%3Bif(diff%3C0.5)return%3Bif(side%3D%3D%3D'top'%7C%7Cside%3D%3D%3D'bottom')%7Bvar%20xa%3D(a.left%2Ba.right)%2F2%3Bvar%20xb%3D(b.left%2Bb.right)%2F2%3Bvar%20xTarget%3Db.left%3C%3Dxa%26%26xa%3C%3Db.right%3Fxa%3A(b.left%2Bb.right)%2F2%3BdrawLine(xTarget%2Cv1%2CxTarget%2Cv2%2CCOLOR_LINE%2Ctrue)%3BdrawLabel(xTarget%2C(v1%2Bv2)%2F2%2Cround(diff)%2B'px')%3B%7Delse%7Bvar%20ya%3D(a.top%2Ba.bottom)%2F2%3Bvar%20yTarget%3Db.top%3C%3Dya%26%26ya%3C%3Db.bottom%3Fya%3A(b.top%2Bb.bottom)%2F2%3BdrawLine(v1%2CyTarget%2Cv2%2CyTarget%2CCOLOR_LINE%2Ctrue)%3BdrawLabel((v1%2Bv2)%2F2%2CyTarget%2Cround(diff)%2B'px')%3B%7D%7Dfunction%20drawSelectionOnly()%7BclearSVG()%3Bif(selA)drawRect(selA.rect%2CCOLOR_A%2Cfalse)%3Bif(selB)drawRect(selB.rect%2CCOLOR_B%2Cfalse)%3B%7Dfunction%20pickElement(clientX%2CclientY)%7Bvar%20prev%3Dhost.style.display%3Bhost.style.display%3D'none'%3Bvar%20el%3Ddocument.elementFromPoint(clientX%2CclientY)%3Bhost.style.display%3Dprev%3Breturn%20el%3B%7Dfunction%20updateStatus()%7Bif(!selA)status.textContent%3D'%E9%95%BF%E6%8C%89%E9%80%89%E6%8B%A9%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0'%3Belse%20if(!selB)status.textContent%3D'%E9%95%BF%E6%8C%89%E9%80%89%E6%8B%A9%E7%AC%AC%E4%BA%8C%E4%B8%AA%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0'%3Belse%20status.textContent%3D'%E5%86%8D%E6%AC%A1%E9%95%BF%E6%8C%89%E9%87%8D%E6%96%B0%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B'%3B%7Dfunction%20selectElement(el)%7Bif(!el%7C%7Cel%3D%3D%3Ddocument.documentElement%7C%7Cel%3D%3D%3Ddocument.body)return%3Bif(host.contains(el))return%3Bif(navigator.vibrate)%7Btry%7Bnavigator.vibrate(30)%3B%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7D%7Dif(!selA)%7BselA%3D%7Bel%3Ael%2Crect%3ArectOf(el)%7D%3BdrawSelectionOnly()%3B%7Delse%20if(!selB)%7Bif(el%3D%3D%3DselA.el)return%3BselB%3D%7Bel%3Ael%2Crect%3ArectOf(el)%7D%3BdrawSpacing(selA.rect%2CselB.rect)%3B%7Delse%7BselA%3D%7Bel%3Ael%2Crect%3ArectOf(el)%7D%3BselB%3Dnull%3BdrawSelectionOnly()%3B%7DupdateStatus()%3B%7Dfunction%20reset()%7BselA%3Dnull%3BselB%3Dnull%3BclearSVG()%3BupdateStatus()%3B%7Dfunction%20showProgressAt(x%2Cy)%7Bprogress.style.left%3Dx%2B'px'%3Bprogress.style.top%3Dy%2B'px'%3Bprogress.style.opacity%3D'1'%3B%7Dfunction%20hideProgress()%7Bprogress.style.opacity%3D'0'%3B%7Dfunction%20cancelTimer()%7Bif(touchTimer)%7BclearTimeout(touchTimer)%3BtouchTimer%3Dnull%3B%7DpressActive%3Dfalse%3BhideProgress()%3B%7Dfunction%20onTouchStart(e)%7Bvar%20target%3De.target%3Bif(host.contains(target))return%3Bif(e.touches.length!%3D%3D1)%7BcancelTimer()%3Breturn%3B%7Dvar%20t%3De.touches%5B0%5D%3BstartPoint%3D%7Bx%3At.clientX%2Cy%3At.clientY%7D%3BpressActive%3Dtrue%3BshowProgressAt(t.clientX%2Ct.clientY)%3BtouchTimer%3DsetTimeout(function()%7Bif(!pressActive)return%3Bvar%20el%3DpickElement(startPoint.x%2CstartPoint.y)%3BselectElement(el)%3BhideProgress()%3BpressActive%3Dfalse%3BtouchTimer%3Dnull%3B%7D%2CLONG_PRESS_MS)%3B%7Dfunction%20onTouchMove(e)%7Bif(!pressActive%7C%7C!startPoint)return%3Bvar%20t%3De.touches%5B0%5D%3Bvar%20dx%3Dt.clientX-startPoint.x%3Bvar%20dy%3Dt.clientY-startPoint.y%3Bif(Math.hypot(dx%2Cdy)%3EMOVE_TOLERANCE)%7BcancelTimer()%3B%7D%7Dfunction%20onTouchEnd()%7BcancelTimer()%3BstartPoint%3Dnull%3B%7Ddocument.addEventListener('touchstart'%2ConTouchStart%2C%7Bpassive%3Atrue%7D)%3Bdocument.addEventListener('touchmove'%2ConTouchMove%2C%7Bpassive%3Atrue%7D)%3Bdocument.addEventListener('touchend'%2ConTouchEnd%2C%7Bpassive%3Atrue%7D)%3Bdocument.addEventListener('touchcancel'%2ConTouchEnd%2C%7Bpassive%3Atrue%7D)%3Bfunction%20refresh()%7Bif(selA)selA.rect%3DrectOf(selA.el)%3Bif(selB)selB.rect%3DrectOf(selB.el)%3Bif(selA%26%26selB)drawSpacing(selA.rect%2CselB.rect)%3Belse%20drawSelectionOnly()%3B%7Dwindow.addEventListener('resize'%2Crefresh)%3Bwindow.addEventListener('scroll'%2Crefresh%2Ctrue)%3BbtnClear.addEventListener('click'%2Cfunction(e)%7Be.stopPropagation()%3Breset()%3B%7D)%3BbtnClear.addEventListener('touchstart'%2Cfunction(e)%7Be.stopPropagation()%3B%7D%2C%7Bpassive%3Atrue%7D)%3BbtnClose.addEventListener('click'%2Cfunction(e)%7Be.stopPropagation()%3Bapi.destroy()%3B%7D)%3BbtnClose.addEventListener('touchstart'%2Cfunction(e)%7Be.stopPropagation()%3B%7D%2C%7Bpassive%3Atrue%7D)%3Bvar%20api%3D%7Bversion%3A'1.0.0'%2Creset%3Areset%2Cdestroy%3Afunction()%7Bdocument.removeEventListener('touchstart'%2ConTouchStart)%3Bdocument.removeEventListener('touchmove'%2ConTouchMove)%3Bdocument.removeEventListener('touchend'%2ConTouchEnd)%3Bdocument.removeEventListener('touchcancel'%2ConTouchEnd)%3Bwindow.removeEventListener('resize'%2Crefresh)%3Bwindow.removeEventListener('scroll'%2Crefresh%2Ctrue)%3Bdocument.removeEventListener('contextmenu'%2ConContextMenu)%3Bdocument.documentElement.style.userSelect%3DprevRootStyle.userSelect%3Bdocument.documentElement.style.webkitUserSelect%3DprevRootStyle.webkitUserSelect%3Bdocument.documentElement.style.webkitTouchCallout%3DprevRootStyle.webkitTouchCallout%3Bif(host%26%26host.parentNode)host.parentNode.removeChild(host)%3Bdelete%20window.__mobileSpacing%3B%7D%2C%7D%3Bwindow.__mobileSpacing%3Dapi%3B%7D)()%3B
